Drop-in UI Customization References

The Xbox Drop-in UI provides interfaces, structures, and enumerations that are used when implementing custom Xbox Drop-in UI plug-ins.

This section contains the Xbox Drop-in UI customization reference.

  • Drop-in UI Customization Interfaces
  • Drop-in UI Customization Structures
  • Drop-in UI Customization Enumerations
